author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The v2.0 write branch (u32 header length, triggered when dict > 65535 bytes) and the corresponding reader branch were untested.

Added 4 tests:
- v20_writer_roundtrip_huge_shape: forces writer through v2.0 with a 22000-axis shape; asserts version bytes (2, 0) and round-trip exactness.
- v20_reader_handcrafted_minimal: hand-built v2.0 byte blob - guards against codependent bugs where every v2.0 header comes from our own writer.
- v20_reader_rejects_oversized_header: 2 MB claimed header length is rejected before allocation, exercising the existing 1 MB cap.
- v30_reader_handcrafted_minimal: same u32 branch via v3.0 to ensure reader doesn't bake in major==2.

npy::header::tests: 9 -> 13, ferray-io: 93 -> 97 passing, clippy clean. Commit 4eef9cc2.
